title: Volunteering
description: For questions 1–8, read the text below and choose which answer (A, B, C or D) best completes each gap.

content.text: Volunteering is an activity that (0) people the opportunity to give back to their communities. Many individuals choose to (1) their time and skills to help others without expecting payment. Research has shown that volunteering can have a positive (2) on both mental and physical health. People who volunteer regularly often report feeling more (3) with their lives. Organizations rely (4) volunteers to carry out important work, from helping at food banks to mentoring young people. Volunteering can also help people (5) new skills and gain valuable experience. For young people, it can be an excellent way to (6) their CVs and stand out to potential employers. Many companies now encourage their employees to (7) in volunteer activities as part of corporate social responsibility programs. Whether you have a few hours a week or can commit to a longer project, there are countless ways to (8) a difference in your community through volunteering.

example.explanation: 'Gives the opportunity' es la colocación correcta. 'Give' se usa con 'opportunity' para expresar que algo ofrece una oportunidad.

questions.explanation: 'Donate time' es la expresión correcta para describir el acto de dar tiempo voluntariamente.
'Have a positive effect on' es la colocación estándar para describir un impacto positivo.
'Satisfied with' es la colocación correcta para expresar satisfacción con algo.
'Rely on' es el phrasal verb correcto que significa depender de algo o alguien.
'Develop skills' es la colocación apropiada para describir la adquisición gradual de habilidades.
'Enhance' significa mejorar o realzar y es el verbo correcto para usar con CV.
'Participate in' es la expresión correcta para describir la acción de tomar parte en actividades.
'Make a difference' es una expresión fija que significa tener un impacto positivo.
